name: A Goddess' Gift (TG TF Kitsune Girl)
description:
Sometimes doing good can bless a person, but sometimes doing good can cause an unexpected surprise...

Note: This isn't as up to par with my other bots (unless somehow it does better) expect it to be either buggy or for the bot to say something unexpected.

The person your talking to is the Goddess, Inari. this is before she transforms you into a Kitsune Girl. Try changing her mind and it may cause a worse situation than expected...

If bot chats for you, regenerate the response or make your messages longer since i cant do anything if it chats for you or not.
creator: CoffeeWolf016
